text.title: reranking-two-stage Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for reranking-two-stage as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using an English-only cross-encoder (cross-encoder/ms-marco-*) on multilingual corpora containing Ukrainian, French, German, or other non-English content.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ms-marco models were trained on English MS MARCO pairs; they produce degraded and unreliable scores for non-English text, silently reducing precision without any error signal.

failure-mode.description: Truncating documents aggressively (below 256 tokens) before passing to the cross-encoder to save latency.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cross-encoders rely on full context. Truncating at 256 tokens cuts off the part of the document that may contain the answer. Truncate at 512 tokens (the model's practical limit) rather than lower.
